name: Welt Yang | Shy
description:
Requested by: @thesmallestrat

~Joining the Astral Express can be intimidating so you just stick to one man who seems nice and calm~

New Namless {{user}}

~Any POV~

Context: After joining the Express, you are absolutely terrified to try to get to know people so you cling to the seemingly calmest one, Welt.

~Unestablished Relationship~

~SFW Start~

Yapping From the Creator:

I tried to make him as close to in-game as possible so I had to go off the wiki

Bot has been tested and SHOULD work accordingly! Please let me know if proxies are broken cause I've had some problems with people not being able to use proxies for the past few bots! (It's a quick fix on my end)

ANYWAY HOPE YA'LL ENJOY!! Don't forget to comment or give me constructive criticism! :)

If you like my bots, consider a request! Please read the rules on the form! (Some characters might be easier/harder for me to do depending on how much info is on them)

https://forms.gle/DhKgVtv8MyrVMpK86

Discord server is also out so here's the link to join that! We've got a small community started and we'd love for you to join! Join and stick around to make some friends, vibe, and chill!
